methods.name: ros_cdk_hologram.datasource.Instance.attr_instance
documentation: Attribute Instance: The attributes of the instance.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::Hologram::Instance`, which is used to query the detailed information about a Hologres instance by instance ID.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosInstance\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-hologram-instance>

methods.name: ros_cdk_hologram.datasource.InstanceProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Instance`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-hologram-instance>

```
param instance_id

Property instanceId: The ID of the instance.

param refresh_options

Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Valid values: - Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. - Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Default is Never.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_hologram.datasource.InstanceProps.instance_id
documentation: Property instanceId: The ID of the instance.

documentation:
Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated.

Valid values:

- Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
- Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
  Default is Never.

refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Valid values:

- Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
- Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
Default is Never.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::Hologram::Instance`, which is used to query the detailed information about a Hologres instance by instance ID.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Instance` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-hologram-instance>

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::Hologram::Instance`, which is used to create a Hologres instance.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosInstance\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-hologram-instance>

methods.name: ros_cdk_hologram.InstanceProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Instance`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-hologram-instance>

```
param endpoints

Property endpoints: List of domain names.

param instance_name

Property instanceName: The name of the resource.

param instance_type

Property instanceType: The instance type. Value: - Standard: Universal. - Follower: Read-only slave instance. - Warehouse: calculation group type. - Shared: Shared.

param payment_type

Property paymentType: The payment type of the resource.

param zone_id

Property zoneId: The zone Id.

param auto_pay

Property autoPay: Whether to pay automatically. The default value is true. Value: - true: automatic payment - false: only generate orders, not pay .. epigraph:: The default value is true. If the balance of your payment method is insufficient, you can set the parameter AutoPay to false, and an unpaid order will be generated. You can log in to the user Center to pay by yourself.

param cold_storage_size

Property coldStorageSize: Instance low-frequency storage space. Unit: GB. .. epigraph:: Pay-As-You-Go (PostPaid) instances ignore this parameter.

param cpu

Property cpu: Instance specifications. Value: - 8 cores 32 GB (number of compute nodes: 1) - 16 cores 64 GB (number of compute nodes: 1) - 32 core 128 GB (number of compute nodes: 2) - 64 core 256 GB (number of compute nodes: 4) - 96 core 384 GB (number of computing nodes: 6) - 128 core 512 GB (number of compute nodes: 8) - Wait .. epigraph:: .. epigraph:: - just fill in the audit number. - Please submit a work order application for purchasing 1024 or above specifications. - Shared instance types do not need to specify specifications. The specification of -8 core 32GB (number of computing nodes: 1) is only for experience use and cannot be used for production.

param duration

Property duration: The buying cycle. Buy for 2 months. .. epigraph:: If the Payment type is PostPaid, you do not need to specify it.

param gateway_count

Property gatewayCount: Number of gateway nodes.

param initial_databases

Property initialDatabases: Initialize the database and split multiple database names ",".

param leader_instance_id

Property leaderInstanceId: The id of leader instance.

param pricing_cycle

Property pricingCycle: Billing cycle. Value: - Month: monthly billing - Hour: hourly billing .. epigraph:: .. epigraph:: - PrePaid only supports Month - PostPaid only supports Hour - The Shared type is automatically set to Hour without specifying it.

param product_code

Property productCode: product code.

param resource_group_id

Property resourceGroupId: The ID of the resource group.

param scale_type

Property scaleType: Change matching type. Value: - UPGRADE: UPGRADE - DOWNGRADE: Downgrading .. epigraph:: .. epigraph:: - The upgrade specification cannot be less than the original specification. A blank field indicates that the original specification remains unchanged. On this basis, at least one specification is larger than the original specification. - The downgrading specification cannot be greater than the original specification. A blank field indicates that the original specification remains unchanged. On this basis, at least one specification is smaller than the original specification.

param storage_size

Property storageSize: The standard storage space of the instance. Unit: GB. .. epigraph:: Pay-As-You-Go instances (PostPaid) ignore this parameter.

param tags

Property tags: Tags of instance.
```

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::Hologram::Instance`, which is used to create a Hologres instance.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Instance` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-hologram-instance>
